title: Daily predict + storage workflow — Firestore writes + 3 schema frozensets exported
text: GitHub Actions cron at 04:00 UTC reads latest CSV, calls predictor with active Firestore params, writes predictions/{ts} doc, backfills actuals/{ts} for predictions older than 72h, recomputes backtest_summaries/{today} over last 30 days. Exported FIRESTORE_PREDICTION_FIELDS / FIRESTORE_ACTUAL_FIELDS / FIRESTORE_BACKTEST_SUMMARY_FIELDS frozensets as cross-ticket schema contract for K-081 (frontend reader) and K-082 (optimizer reader). Idempotent set() overwrite + retry-once with 5s sleep; 90-min CSV freshness gate; permanent failure exits non-zero.

title: Known-reds manifest cleanup — 20 stale entries removed (22→2 active)
text: Dropped 20 known-red entries whose route.fulfill() mocks were already wired; K-013×4, ma99×13, upload×3 all pass 20/20. Prior failures were state contamination from backgrounded Playwright runs. Remaining manifest: ga-spa-pageview + visual-report.

title: Firestore plumbing + backend predictor-param loader for self-tuning epic
text: Stood up Firestore as shared config store; refactored backend boot so MA_TREND_WINDOW_DAYS / MA_TREND_PEARSON_THRESHOLD / top_k read from ParamSnapshot at runtime. Atomic GIL-safe module-level swap; 5s ThreadPoolExecutor timeout with graceful default fallback. /health exposes allow-listed ParamSnapshot fields only. Sacred 2-layer rewrite replaces brittle constant assertion with AST structure + behavior floor invariants.

title: E2E test cleanup — T14 DOM fix, data-redaction removal, Footer baselines regen
text: Fixed 4 deferred known-red E2E tests: T14 timing gate + FooterDisclaimer assertion, data-redaction obsolete removal, 3 Footer snapshot baselines regenerated, scroll threshold self-healed.

title: Content SSOT externalize — 3 component arrays to site-content.json + README METRICS marker
text: Externalized ProjectLogicSection STEPS (3 items), ProjectArchitectureSection layers (3 items), and WhereISteppedInSection ROWS (3 items) from inline TypeScript constants to site-content.json. Added README METRICS marker block so featuresShipped/acCoverage/postMortems/lessonsCodified auto-update via generator. Added shared site-content.types.ts. QA fixed two known-reds manifest gaps (Footer snapshot on /, ga-spa test title).

title: K-066 Designer close — homepage-v2.pen narrative + feature count + stack row updated
text: Updated homepage-v2.pen frame GMEdT: narrative rewritten to single-operator arc, bottom bar updated to 50 features shipped, THE ROLES pill row deleted. Frame 4CsvQ: hero subtext updated to K-057 approved copy, stack row corrected to TypeScript·React·Vite·Python·FastAPI·Playwright, hero-product-shot placeholder added (960×540).

title: renderSlots.about.processRules corrected from placeholder 5 to 0
text: Confirmed no React component reads siteContent.processRules[]; renderSlots.about.processRules was an unrealized placeholder set to 5. Corrected to 0 to accurately reflect that the About page does not render the processRules array.

title: processRules PM query tool + systematic backfill 5→17 entries
text: Added npm run rules query script and backfilled processRules from 5 to 17 entries covering critical-blocker, warning, and advisory tiers. K-063 Release Status corrected from no-change to added.

title: Architecture SSOT cleanup — 22 stale annotations cleared, changelog collapsed 53%
text: Cleared 22 stale pending annotations accumulated since K-024, removed a prohibited Retrospective section, added missing content/ directory to the tree, closed TD-008 (implemented K-013 2026-04-21), rewrote the Summary to 5 current-state bullets, collapsed pre-K-063 Changelog entries from 123 KB to 58 KB, and relocated the GA4 test matrix and QA artifacts sections to their canonical SSOT files.

title: Auto-scraper complete — Binance Vision S3 + Cloud Run deploy verified end-to-end
text: Switched data source from geo-blocked api.binance.com to data.binance.vision (AWS S3, no geo-restriction); fixed µs timestamp parsing and numpy import isolation; committed frontend/.env.production so Cloud Build can read VITE_GA_MEASUREMENT_ID. Workflow ran end-to-end: scraped 504 1H bars, committed, deployed Cloud Run revision f093027.

title: Auto-scraper Phase 2 — GitHub Actions daily cron + Binance klines fetch
text: Implemented scrape_history.py (Binance klines API, pagination loop, closed-only filter, idempotent exit) and .github/workflows/scrape-history.yml (cron 03:00 UTC, commit [skip ci], Cloud Run deploy). Three unit tests cover closed-only/pagination/idempotent ACs. GH_PAT + GCP_SA_KEY secrets required in repo settings before first cron run.

title: Auto-scraper foundation — history DB freshness API + stale indicator UI
text: Added freshness_hours to /api/history-info response and a stale indicator (≥48h) to the History Reference UI section; extracted history_utils.py for Phase 2 scraper use.

title: Designer JSON SSOT — responsive + tailwindHint schema enforcement
text: Added a JSON schema + validator that requires every horizontal-with-multiple-children frame spec to declare its mobile + desktop Tailwind classes, closing the K-067 layout gap.

title: About page — WHERE I STEPPED IN card unification + section label rename
text: Removed desktop table, unified WHERE I STEPPED IN to 3 cards (mobile stacked, desktop side-by-side); renamed Nº labels; updated narrative to constraint-system framing.

title: WhereISteppedIn narrative + bottom bar SSOT + homepage .pen sync
text: Revised operator narrative, SSOT-driven bottom bar, and synced .pen frames GMEdT and 4CsvQ to shipped copy.

title: UI polish — hero accent color corrected, MetricCard height constraint removed
text: Fixed hero heading accent from brick-dark to brick and removed the MetricCard minimum-height constraint causing excess whitespace.

title: Retro format — add Slowest step field to all role retrospective entries
text: Added a mandatory Slowest step field to the retrospective format across all six role personas and the workflow spec.

title: README Folder Structure section — auto-generated from SSOT JSON
text: Added a Folder Structure section to the README, generated from a JSON file so it stays in sync as the project grows.

title: Fix 24 E2E failures — consent banner was blocking pointer events in headless runs
text: Added consent pre-seeding to 3 E2E specs so cookie banner no longer blocks button clicks during headless runs.

title: /diary — Infinite Scroll + paper-palette loading rebrand
text: /diary now loads entries automatically as you scroll — replaced the manual 'Load more' button. Loading state rebranded to paper palette.

title: K-057 SSOT backfill — DisclaimerBanner + Disclaimer section design spec
text: Design SSOT backfilled for two components shipped in K-057 without a Designer pass: DisclaimerBanner and Disclaimer section.

title: About page — one operator, six AI agents framing batch
text: Added two new /about sections — operator decision table and agent pipeline diagram — and compacted the role card layout.

title: Landing product polish — hero reframe, consent gate, funnel events
text: Reframed the landing hero as a K-line similarity lookup engine, added a cookie consent gate, and wired four funnel events.

title: Ticket-derived SSOT — site-content.json + Sacred Registry + JSON-driven frontend
text: Built a generator that auto-updates portfolio metrics and the README from the ticket corpus.

title: README cleanup + BFP narrative (translation split to K-055)
text: Polished the README narrative and translated remaining Chinese lines in design and ticket docs.

title: Scroll-to-top on route change
text: Pages now scroll to top on navigation while preserving anchor links.

title: Daily history DB backfill + Cloud Build rollup-musl fix
text: Backfilled 16 missing daily ETH/USDT bars and fixed a Cloud Run build failure blocking deployment.

title: Footer social links — clickable brand-asset icons + click-to-copy email
text: Restored Footer links for email, GitHub, and LinkedIn, plus a click-to-copy email button.

title: Neutralize upload-history write path + example CSV download
text: Disabled database writes on upload to prevent visitor data pollution; added an example CSV download link.

title: Desktop layout consistency across /about, /, /diary
text: Aligned desktop layouts across all routes — consistent width and padding on Home, About, and Diary.

title: README showcase rewrite — agent team primary identity plus v2 before/after
text: Rewrote the README to lead with the six-agent pipeline narrative and synced role descriptions across the site.

title: PageHero shared component — responsive mobile type scale unifies Home/About/Diary H1
text: Unified the page hero heading style across Home, About, and Diary.

title: /diary mobile rail and marker restore via shared-component mobileVisible prop
text: Restored the /diary mobile timeline rail and date markers.

title: Split SSOT for /about role cards
text: Separated role-card visual layout from content so each has a single owner.

title: Sitewide UI polish batch — Bodoni to Geist Mono reset plus 8 polish items
text: Reset sitewide font to Geist Mono and shipped eight UI polish items across padding and spacing.

title: Favicon wiring and Web App Manifest
text: Wired the K-036 favicon and Web App Manifest into the site.

title: About footer Pencil-SSOT unification
text: Unified the Footer across all routes to a single design-spec implementation.

title: Favicon design and rasterization
text: Designed a golden-cross K-line favicon and exported it to all standard web and mobile formats.

title: NavBar hex-to-token refactor
text: Migrated the NavBar from hardcoded colors to design-system tokens.

title: About paper palette migration
text: Migrated /about component colors from dark theme to the paper palette.

title: GA4 SPA pageview hardening
text: Added test coverage for GA4 SPA pageview tracking.

title: Remove Built by AI showcase from /about
text: Removed the explanatory Built-by-AI showcase section from /about; the homepage banner stays.

title: README Future Enhancements roadmap
text: Grouped open tickets into three recruiter-facing categories — Design System, Analytics, Architecture — to surface roadmap thinking alongside shipped features.

title: Homepage structure alignment v2
text: Closed the remaining homepage v2 visual alignment items: diary markers, flow card headers, and body padding.

title: About structure alignment v2
text: Aligned /about to design v2 across twelve visual items including headers, labels, and palette migration.

title: Sitewide design system baseline
text: Shipped the sitewide paper palette and font system, unblocking the /about and homepage redesign.

title: Automated visual report script
text: Added a script that auto-screenshots every route into an HTML visual report.

title: Early project phases and deployment setup
text: Bootstrapped the FastAPI + React app with a K-line similarity forecast UI, deployed to Cloud Run and Firebase Hosting.
